DeleteRecordResponse.DeleteRecordResult:
Violação de chave estrangeira
Possíveis causas: - exclusão de registro que possui outros registros associados ======================================= at RM.Lib.Data.DbServices.QueryUpdate(DataSet dataSet, String tableName) ======================================= The DELETE statement conflicted with the REFERENCE constraint "FK_X". The conflict occurred in database "X", table "dbo.Y". ======================================= DELETE FROM [PPESSOA] WHERE CODIGO=26620 =======================================
